items.name: 千手観音堂
items.description: 現在の堂宇は領主千本大和守義貞によって修復され、正面欄間の竜の彫刻などが特徴。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Ichikai Town.

items.name: 上根観音堂
items.description: 唐様の三間四方の仏堂で、十二支や七福神の彫刻が施されている。建立は江戸時代と推定。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Ichikai Town.

items.name: 熊野神社
items.description: 長暦2年（1038年）市花十郎直正により建立。宝永4年（1707年）社殿再建、明治30年現在地に遷座。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Ichikai Town.

items.name: 地蔵菩薩坐像
items.location: 町立歴史民俗資料館常設展示
items.description: 仏師・荒井数馬古春により寛政元年（1789）12月の作。木造で左手に宝珠、右手に錫杖を執る。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Ichikai Town. It is located in the permanent exhibition of the Town History and Folklore Museum.

items.name: 下野国芳賀郡上根村外4か村村入会地境裁許絵図面
items.description: 祖母井村・上根村・稲毛田村・多田羅村・赤羽村の境界、入会秣場争いなど5件の係争について幕府評定所が裁定を下した裁許状。歴史資料。

en.name_romaji: Shimotsuke no Kuni Haga-gun Kamine-mura Hoka Yon-kason Nyūkaichi Sakai Saikyo Ezumen
en.name_en: Adjudication map of the common-land boundary of Kamine village and four other villages in Haga District, Shimotsuke Province
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Ichikai Town.

items.name: 下野国芳賀郡上根村外4か村村入会地境裁許絵図面・裏書

en.name_romaji: Shimotsuke no Kuni Haga-gun Kamine-mura Hoka Yon-kason Nyūkaichi Sakai Saikyo Ezumen・Uragaki
en.name_en: Adjudication map of the common-land boundary of Kamine village and four other villages in Haga District, Shimotsuke Province, with endorsement
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Ichikai Town.

items.name: 横塚古墳出土器財埴輪
items.location: 町立歴史民俗資料館所蔵
items.description: 大刀形埴輪1点と槍形埴輪2点（器財埴輪3点）。横塚古墳（伊許山の麓、全長52mの前方後円墳）から昭和32年出土。令和7年1月24日に市貝町指定有形文化財（考古資料）として指定。

en.name_en: Object-shaped haniwa excavated from the Yokozuka burial mound
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, classified as an archaeological material. It is town-designated by Ichikai Town, designated on 2025-01-24. It is held at the Town History and Folklore Museum.
